verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ካልእ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ዘኮነ ፡ በመዋዕለ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ፍልስጥኤም ፡ በጌራራ ።

translations.lxx: And there was a famine in the land, besides the former famine, which was in the time of Abraam; and Isaac went to Abimelech the king of the Phylistines to Gerara.
translations.kjv: And there was a famine in the land, beside the first famine that was in the days of Abraham. And Isaac went unto Abimelech king of the Philistines unto Gerar.

verses.geez:
ወአስተርአዮ ፡ አምላክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢትረድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኅድር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡
                  አነ ፡ እቤለከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord appeared to him and said, Go not down to Egypt, but dwell in the land, which I shall tell thee of.
translations.kjv: And the LORD appeared unto him, and said, Go not down into Egypt; dwell in the land which I shall tell thee of:

verses.geez:
ወንበር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወአሐውር ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወእባርከከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለከ ፡ ወለዘርእከ ፡ እሁባ ፡ ሊዛቲ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ወኣቀውም ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ መሐላየ ፡ ዘመሐልኩ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ አቡከ ።

translations.lxx: And sojourn in this land; and I will be with thee, and bless thee, for I will give to thee and to thy seed all this land; and I will establish my oath which I swore to thy father Abraam.
translations.kjv: Sojourn in this land, and I will be with thee, and will bless thee; for unto thee, and unto thy seed, I will give all these countries, and I will perform the oath which I sware unto Abraham thy father;

verses.geez:
ወኣበዝኆ ፡ ለዘርእከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኮከበ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወእሁባ ፡ ለዘርእከ ፡ ኵላ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወይትባረክ ፡ በዘርእከ
                  ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አሕዛበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And I will multiply thy seed as the stars of heaven; and I will give to thy seed all this land, and all the nations of the earth shall be blest in thy seed.
translations.kjv: And I will make thy seed to multiply as the stars of heaven, and will give unto thy seed all these countries; and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed;

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ቃለ ፡ ዚአየ ፡ ወዐቀበ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወኵነኔየ ፡ ወሕግየ ።

translations.lxx: Because Abraam thy father hearkened to my voice, and kept my injunctions, and my commandments, and my ordinances, and my statutes.
translations.kjv: Because that Abraham obeyed my voice, and kept my charge, my commandments, my statutes, and my laws.

verses.geez: ወነበረ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጌራራ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac dwelt in Gerara.
translations.kjv: And Isaac dwelt in Gerar:

verses.geez:
ወተስእልዎ ፡ [ሰብአ ፡ ብሔር ፡] ለይስሐቅ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እኅትየ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ፈርሀ ፡ አይድዖቶሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይቅትልዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ብእሲቱ
                  ፡ እስመ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ገጻ ።

translations.lxx: And the men of the place questioned him concerning Rebecca his wife, and he said, She is my sister, for he feared to say, She is my wife, lest at any time the men of the place should slay him because of Rebecca, because she was fair.
translations.kjv: And the men of the place asked him of his wife; and he said, She is my sister: for he feared to say, She is my wife; lest, said he, the men of the place should kill me for Rebekah; because she was fair to look upon.

verses.geez:
ወነበረ ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ሐወጸ ፡ ንጉሥ ፡ እንተ ፡ መስኮት ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ይትዌነይ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ብእሲቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he remained there a long time, and Abimelech the king of Gerara leaned to look through the window, and saw Isaac sporting with Rebecca his wife.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when he had been there a long time, that Abimelech king of the Philistines looked out at a window, and saw, and, behold, Isaac was sporting with Rebekah his wife.

verses.geez:
ወጸውዖ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ብእሲትከ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወት[ቤ]ለኒ ፡ እኅትየ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወይቤ ፡
                  ይስሐቅ ፡ እስመ ፡ እቤ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ይቀትሉኒ ፡ በእንቲአሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech called Isaac, and said to him, Is she then thy wife? why hast thou said, She is my sister? And Isaac said to him, I did so, for I said, Lest at any time I die on her account.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech called Isaac, and said, Behold, of a surety she is thy wife: and how saidst thou, She is my sister? And Isaac said unto him, Because I said, Lest I die for her.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ዘረሰይከነ ፡ ሕቀ ፡ ክመ ፡ ዘእምሰከበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ብእሲትከ ፡ ዘእምአዝማድየ
                  ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወእምአምጻእከ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ በኢያእምሮ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech said to him, Why hast thou done this to us? one of my kindred within a little had lain with thy wife, and thou wouldest have brought a sin of ignorance upon us.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech said, What is this thou hast done unto us? one of the people might lightly have lien with thy wife, and thou shouldest have brought guiltiness upon us.

verses.geez: ወአዘዘ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ አሕዛቢሁ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘሰሐጦ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ሞት ፡ እኩይ ፡ ኵነኔሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech charged all his people, saying, Every man that touches this man and his wife shall be liable to death.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech charged all his people, saying, He that toucheth this man or his wife shall surely be put to death.

verses.geez: ወዘርዐ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወኮኖ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ምክዕቢተ ፡ ወባረኮ ፡ አምላክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac sowed in that land, and he found in that year barley an hundred-fold, and the Lord blessed him.
translations.kjv: Then Isaac sowed in that land, and received in the same year an hundredfold: and the LORD blessed him.

verses.geez: ወተለዐለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወየዐቢ ፡ ወየዐቢ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And the man was exalted, and advancing he increased, till he became very great.
translations.kjv: And the man waxed great, and went forward, and grew until he became very great:

verses.geez: ወአጥረየ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ወአልህምተ ፡ ወገራውሀ ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ ወቀንኡ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ፍልስጥኤም ።

translations.lxx: And he had cattle of sheep, and cattle of oxen, and many tilled lands, and the Phylistines envied him.
translations.kjv: For he had possession of flocks, and possession of herds, and great store of servants: and the Philistines envied him.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ዐዘቃተ ፡ ዘከረዩ ፡ ደቀ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ በመዋዕለ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ደፈንዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ፍልስጥኤም ፡ ወመልእዎ ፡
                  መሬተ ።

translations.lxx: And all the wells which the servants of his father had dug in the time of his father, the Phylistines stopped them, and filled them with earth.
translations.kjv: For all the wells which his father’s servants had digged in the days of Abraham his father, the Philistines had stopped them, and filled them with earth.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ሑር ፡ እምኔነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ጸናዕከነ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech said to Isaac, Depart from us, for thou art become much mightier than we.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech said unto Isaac, Go from us; for thou art much mightier than we.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ጌራራ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac departed thence, and rested in the valley of Gerara, and dwelt there.
translations.kjv: And Isaac departed thence, and pitched his tent in the valley of Gerar, and dwelt there.

verses.geez:
ወካዕበ ፡ ከረዮን ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ለዐዘቃተ ፡ ማይ ፡ እለ ፡ ከረዩ ፡ አግብርተ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ዘደፈኑ ፡ ሰብአ ፡
                  ፍልስጥኤም ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ሞተ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ወሰመዮን ፡ በአስማቲሆን ፡ ዘሰመዮን ፡ አብርሃም ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac dug again the wells of water, which the servants of his father Abraam had dug, and the Phylistines had stopped them, after the death of his father Abraam; and he gave them names, according to the names by which his father named them.
translations.kjv: And Isaac digged again the wells of water, which they had digged in the days of Abraham his father; for the Philistines had stopped them after the death of Abraham: and he called their names after the names by which his father had called them.

verses.geez: ወከረዩ ፡ አግብርተ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ዐዘቃተ ፡ በቈላተ ፡ ጌራራ ፡ ወረከቡ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ ማይ ፡ ጥዑም ።

translations.lxx: And the servants of Isaac dug in the valley of Gerara, and they found there a well of living water.
translations.kjv: And Isaac’s servants digged in the valley, and found there a well of springing water.

verses.geez:
ወተባአሱ ፡ ኖሎተ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወኖሎተ ፡ ጌራራ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ ዚአነ ፡ ማይ ፡ ወሰመያ ፡ ስማ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡
                  ዐዘቅተ ፡ ዐመፃ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዐመፅዎ ።

translations.lxx: And the shepherds of Gerara strove with the shepherds of Isaac, saying that the water was theirs; and they called the name of the well, Injury, for they injured him.
translations.kjv: And the herdmen of Gerar did strive with Isaac’s herdmen, saying, The water is ours: and he called the name of the well Esek; because they strove with him.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዘ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወከረየ ፡ ካልአ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ በህየ ፡ ወተሳነንዎ ፡ በእንቲአሃ ፡ ወሰመያ ፡ ስማ ፡
                  ጽልእ ።

translations.lxx: And having departed thence he dug another well, and they strove also for that; and he named the name of it, Enmity.
translations.kjv: And they digged another well, and strove for that also: and he called the name of it Sitnah.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዘ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ወከረየ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ወኢተባአስዎ ፡ በእንቲአሃ ፡ ወሰመየ ፡ ስሞ ፡ መርሕብ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡
                  እስመ ፡ አርሐበ ፡ ለነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ወአብዝኀነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድርነ ።

translations.lxx: And he departed thence and dug another well; and they did not strive about that; and he named the name of it, Room, saying, Because now the Lord has made room for us, and has increased us upon the earth.
translations.kjv: And he removed from thence, and digged another well; and for that they strove not: and he called the name of it Rehoboth; and he said, For now the LORD hath made room for us, and we shall be fruitful in the land.

verses.geez: ወግዕዘ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ።

translations.lxx: And he went up thence to the well of the oath.
translations.kjv: And he went up from thence to Beersheba.

verses.geez:
ወአስተርአዮ ፡ አምላክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ነየ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ለ[አብርሃም
                  ፡] አቡከ ፡ ኢትፍራህ ፡ ሀለውኩ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወእባርከከ ፡ ወኣበዝኆ ፡ ለዘርእከ ፡ በእንተ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አቡከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord appeared to him in that night, and said, I am the God of Abraam thy father; fear not, for I am with thee, and I will bless thee, and multiply thy seed for the sake of Abraam thy father.
translations.kjv: And the LORD appeared unto him the same night, and said, I am the God of Abraham thy father: fear not, for I am with thee, and will bless thee, and multiply thy seed for my servant Abraham’s sake.

verses.geez:
ወነደቀ ፡ በህየ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ወጸውዐ ፡ ስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ወተከለ ፡ ህየ ፡
                  ዐጸደ ፡ ወከረዩ ፡ በህየ ፡ ደቀ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ።

translations.lxx: And he built there an altar, and called on the name of the Lord, and there he pitched his tent, and there the servants of Isaac dug a well in the valley of Gerara.
translations.kjv: And he builded an altar there, and called upon the name of the LORD, and pitched his tent there: and there Isaac’s servants digged a well.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ እምነ ፡ ጌራራ ፡ ወአኮዘት ፡ መጋቤ ፡ መራዕይሁ ፡ ወፋኮል ፡ መልአከ ፡ ሰርዌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech came to him from Gerara, and so did Ochozath his friend, and Phichol the commander-in-chief of his army.
translations.kjv: Then Abimelech went to him from Gerar, and Ahuzzath one of his friends, and Phichol the chief captain of his army.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ምንተ ፡ መጻእክሙ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ጸላእክሙኒ ፡ ወሰደድክሙኒ ፡ እምኀቤክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac said to them, Wherefore have ye come to me? whereas ye hated me, and sent me away from you.
translations.kjv: And Isaac said unto them, Wherefore come ye to me, seeing ye hate me, and have sent me away from you?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ርኢነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወንቤ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ማእከሌከ ፡
                  ወማእከሌነ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወንትማሐል ፤

translations.lxx: And they said, We have surely seen that the Lord was with thee, and we said, Let there be an oath between us and thee, and we will make a covenant with thee,
translations.kjv: And they said, We saw certainly that the LORD was with thee: and we said, Let there be now an oath betwixt us, even betwixt us and thee, and let us make a covenant with thee;

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኢትግበር ፡ እኩየ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ እስመ ፡ አኮ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ዘአስቆረርናከ ፡ አላ ፡ አንበርናከ ፡ ሠናየ ፡
                  ወፈነውናከ ፡ በሠናይ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ቡሩክ ፡ አንተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክ ።

translations.lxx: that thou shalt do no wrong by us, as we have not abhorred thee, and according as we have treated thee well, and have sent thee forth peaceably; and now thou art blessed of the Lord.
translations.kjv: That thou wilt do us no hurt, as we have not touched thee, and as we have done unto thee nothing but good, and have sent thee away in peace: thou art now the blessed of the LORD.

verses.geez: ወገብረ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወበልዑ ፡ ወሰትዩ ።

translations.lxx: And he made a feast for them, and they ate and drank.
translations.kjv: And he made them a feast, and they did eat and drink.

verses.geez: ወተንሥኡ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወተማሐሉ ፡ በበይናቲሆሙ ፡ ወፈነዎሙ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ በዳኅን ።

translations.lxx: And they arose in the morning, and swore each to his neighbour; and Isaac sent them forth, and they departed from him in safety.
translations.kjv: And they rose up betimes in the morning, and sware one to another: and Isaac sent them away, and they departed from him in peace.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ በጽሑ ፡ አግብርቲሁ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ [ወነገርዎ ፡] በእንተ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ዘከረዩ ፡ ወኢረከቡ
                  ፡ ማየ ፡ በውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass in that day, that the servants of Isaac came and told him of the well which they had dug; and they said, We have not found water.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass the same day, that Isaac’s servants came, and told him concerning the well which they had digged, and said unto him, We have found water.

verses.geez: ወሰመያ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሰመያ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሀገር ፡ መሐላ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And he called it, Oath: therefore he called the name of that city, the Well of Oath, until this day.
translations.kjv: And he called it Shebah: therefore the name of the city is Beersheba unto this day.

verses.geez:
ወኮኖ ፡ ሊዔሳው ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ዓመቱ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ስማ ፡ ይድን ፡ ወለተ ፡ ብዔል ፡ ኬጥያዊ ፡
                  [ወቤሴሞት ፡ ወለተ ፡ ኤሎን ፡ ኬጥያዊ ።]

translations.lxx: And Esau was forty years old; and he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beoch the Chettite, and Basemath, daughter of Helon the Chettite.
translations.kjv: And Esau was forty years old when he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Bashemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite:

verses.geez: ወይትቃኀዋሆሙ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወለርብቃ ።

translations.lxx: And they were provoking to Isaac and Rebecca.
translations.kjv: Which were a grief of mind unto Isaac and to Rebekah.
